message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant Service A
participant Service B
participant Service C

Service A->>Service A: CPIX document with:
    - Encrypted Content Keys
    - Content Keys signed by Service A
    - Delivery data for Service B
    - Delivery data for Service C
    - Document signed by Service A

Service A->>Service B: arrow
Service A->>Service C: arrow

@enduml
